subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! The Tongue of Grandeur hath testified that there is none other God but Him. His is the dominion and the Kingdom. He doeth whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی قد شهد لسان العظمه انه لا اله الا هو له الملک و الملکوت یفعل ما یشاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
